failure_movement.justification: Unknown predicted drop 3-6; actual -8 (correct dir, slight underestimate). Wrong +1-2 predicted, actual +1 (exact). Correct grows implied, +6. Empty predicted stay 0-2 but actual +1 to 3, minor miss. Strong directional accuracy, mostly right magnitudes.

trace_movement.justification: Retrieved-count rise 'avg > 15' confirmed: 15.1->49.5. Prompt tokens '+10-20%' confirmed at +13% (1460.7->1651.5). Compression/budget claims plausible and consistent. Nearly all verifiable claims confirmed; minor lack of specificity on exact magnitude.

side_effects.justification: Prompt-token rise ~10-20% flagged and held (+13%). Empty-above-4 risk correctly bounded; actual 3 stayed below 4. No regression occurred where flagged; multi-turn split risk did not materialize. Calibrated, accurate risk calls; no false alarms.
